name: nodebb-plugin-cp-chat-harmony
description: High-performance Harmony chat overlay for NodeBB 4.10 with translation, media compression, voice messages, smart replies, and i18n. Safe package without NodeBB peerDependencies for Docker installs.

scripts.lint: node --check library.js && node --check lib/controllers.js && node --check lib/settings.js && node --check public/src/client.js && node --check public/src/i18n.js && node --check public/src/engine.js && node --check public/src/admin.js
